problem: Frontline workers lack easy-to-use tools to report hazards, conduct inspections, and maintain safety compliance, leading to underreporting of incidents, inconsistent safety practices, and difficulty tracking operational improvements across distributed workforces.
solution: SafetyCulture (formerly iAuditor) provides a mobile-first platform for workplace operations that includes AI-powered inspections, incident reporting, training delivery, asset management, and analytics to help organizations drive safety culture and operational excellence.
